prompt: As part of a therapeutic development pipeline, design a high-affinity protein binder targeting TNFRSF1A (Cytokine receptor) expressed by Homo sapiens. The binder should achieve low-nanomolar Kd. provide a approach for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using ESMFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Provide guidance on validation approaches and experimental follow-up.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: TNFRSF1A; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
